flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at John Carroll University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6k → 2.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at John Carroll University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.5k → $50.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at John Carroll University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.5k → $50.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at John Carroll University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
